reasoning_messages.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Remediation script for enabling usbguard service
if ! ( grep -sqE "^.*\.s390x$" /proc/sys/kernel/osrelease || grep -sqE "^s390x$" /proc/sys/kernel/arch ); then
    if rpm --quiet -q kernel-core; then
        SYSTEMCTL_EXEC='/usr/bin/systemctl'
        if [[ $("$SYSTEMCTL_EXEC" is-system-running) != "offline" ]]; then
            "$SYSTEMCTL_EXEC" start 'usbguard.service'
        fi
        "$SYSTEMCTL_EXEC" enable 'usbguard.service'
    else
        echo 'Remediation is not applicable, nothing was done'
        exit 1
    else
        echo 'Remediation is not applicable, nothing was done'
        exit 1
fi
